summary:
GEOPOLITICAL VISIONS AND DEALS: Brandon recounts a vision involving Donald Trump arriving in Ukraine in an F-16 jet, dressed in patriotic attire, to negotiate a mineral deal with Volodymyr Zelensky. Brandon states he saw mounds of dirt, conveyor belts, a fishing industry, and bundled wheat stalks pointing toward France. He notes that news of a similar mineral deal was announced shortly after his vision. Additionally, Brandon describes seeing Vladimir Putin holding a fan of playing cards with the words 'World War III' written across them, waiting for Trump to step aside to take full control of Ukraine and reestablish Soviet roots. He also mentions North Korea forming an Asian front with China, predicting the eventual removal of Kim Jong-un, alongside widespread riots spreading from China to countries like Canada due to suppressive actions against free speech.

MIDDLE EASTERN DEVELOPMENTS AND ESCALATIONS: Brandon details visions of the Middle East, including Trump negotiating a peace treaty involving Israel and Hamas specifically to facilitate the building of the Third Temple on the Temple Mount. He describes an oil derrick in the Mediterranean and a massive economic boom in Iraq, which he equates to the rise of a new Babylon. According to Brandon, wealth will shift from China and America to the Middle East, establishing it as a global financial superpower driven by digital currency initiatives from Saudi Arabia. He connects these events to the emergence of the Antichrist, also referred to as the Mahdi, while emphasizing that God will honor the Abrahamic covenant with the Jewish people, bringing immense agricultural prosperity to Israel regardless of current political leadership. Brandon also reports seeing upcoming surprise attacks, false flag events designed to provoke Iran, and a repetition of 1970s-style gas shortages in America.

ECONOMIC SHIFTS AND GOVERNMENT CORRUPTION: Brandon warns of severe economic disasters and a significant shaking coming to Canada, alongside the fading of America into a new global digital world order rather than returning to its former greatness. He cautions listeners about rumors regarding the elimination of the IRS, advising them not to alter their tax habits prematurely based on political rhetoric. In another vision, Brandon observes the shredding of documents in Ukraine by powerful figures, aiming to cover up corrupt financial side deals, construction contracts, and wealth networks extending into Africa. He implicates both Democratic and Republican politicians in these hidden activities and mentions the involvement of the CIA, symbolized by a hypnotic yellow and black spinning wheel, in manipulating foreign governments.

END TIMES TIMELINE AND SPIRITUAL PROSPERITY: Brandon outlines his belief in a specific four-year window tied to a Shemitah cycle ending in the fall of 2029, which he describes as an extension of grace for a massive transfer of wealth and a short but intense global revival before the tribulation begins. During communion, Brandon declares total physical healing over various conditions such as Hashimoto's, fibromyalgia, lupus, and mental torments, attributing this wellness and financial prosperity directly to the covenant of the cross. He asserts that believers will act as carriers of this divine presence and wealth, utilizing this temporary window of opportunity to gather a vast harvest of souls before a sudden departure from the earth into the tribulation period.
rawData: [May 03, 2025]-[Pray with me today - the Lord is revealing more about the state of the world and what’s coming]-[https://youtu.be/CqifdwkJFLY]-[Hey, good morning family. Thank you for joining me today. I'm excited you're here. I have some things on my heart to talk about. I just wanted to point out what the Lord did whenever we had our prayer time yesterday. And you know, I never know what he's going to share. It's just amazing whenever you start praying and the Lord starts revealing things of the future to you. Less than 24 hours later, Trump announces his mineral deal. And I told you all I saw President Trump—if you watch the prayer time—if you are skipping out on the prayer time just to hear me talk a little bit and not praying with us, you are missing out. I encourage you to listen to the whole video, especially if you like to intercede and pray for the nations. I believe the Lord has called us to this YouTube channel; the primary focus is 'Prayer Changes Things.' And I believe we are changing things in nations. Yesterday, I feel like we went through the whole world. We were praying for elections and so many different things. The Lord had so many things on his heart that he wanted to talk about yesterday, obviously. But one of the major things was that I saw President Trump coming in. He looked like Uncle Sam. His hair was like it always is, but he had a patriotic outfit on—a red and white pinstripe suit and a stars and stripes jacket, like an American flag-looking jacket, and he had a top hat on. He flew in on a jet plane—it looked like an F-16—into Ukraine in this vision. Whenever he got there, he started negotiating. I kept hearing in the spirit realm, 'The Art of the Deal, the Art of the Deal.' He was making a deal yesterday with Zelensky and the Ukrainian people. I'm just going to go over a little bit of it because there are many of you who do not watch the prayer time. He was making a deal, and I saw him negotiating. I saw minerals. I could see mounds of dirt in the background in this vision. I could see conveyor belts with the dirt moving, and then I could see fish coming from the ocean; they were flayed in half and looked like a fishing industry. The Lord showed me the fishing industry and then bales of wheat that were all wrapped in bundles with a white-looking cloth. They were the whole stems—the wheat grain and all of the stalks. The back end of the wheat was pointing this way, and the ends of it that were cut were pointing in a bundle toward France. I could see it pointing toward France, laying down. The Lord was focusing my attention in the vision; I could see the round base of the stalks of the wheat wrapped in a bundle. He said, 'Brandon, this is in play as you speak right now. This is about to manifest.' I could hear it echoing inside of me that this major mineral deal was about to take place. Lo and behold, 24 hours later—after we uploaded that video that morning—they announced on the news that they had signed the mineral deal. So, we saw a prophetic word that was a 24-hour turnaround. That was a big deal to me because usually I wait months, or years sometimes, to see something, but I know there was an urgency to what we were praying over last night and interceding that this would get done—that this was a major domino. Then I saw Vladimir Putin with North Korea in the background with Xi Jinping and his allies. Vladimir Putin had a hand of red and white playing cards. He had five cards in his hand. They were big playing cards, and he was holding them out like a fan and hiding behind those cards, watching to see what was happening in Ukraine. I saw the words 'World War III' in black letters across. Then I remember the oil derrick—I think that was over the Mediterranean. Yes, because there were so many things the Lord showed us yesterday, folks. It was really interesting. Then the Lord showed me Germany, France, and then NATO. I saw an alliance. I saw the land where Russia has taken over; I saw them taking control permanently over that land, trying to create a peace agreement within a four-year window. I saw a time span waiting behind those cards. But I heard the old USSR, the old Soviet Union, was with the KGB, and it was like roots inside Putin; he wants the whole thing, and he was looking for Kyiv. He wants the whole Ukraine. They were waiting for Trump to get out of the way. He has a plan, and in this plan, it was more evil. I could see the escalation of war. He was watching behind his playing cards, trying to play poker. A poker face. I saw North Korea siding with China as an Asian front in the days ahead, using Korea as a lynchpin. Eventually, I believe Kim Jong-un will be removed, and through his sister, there will be revival. I saw riots starting to take place in China—which we see in the news now—but I saw riots becoming more mainstream despite efforts to hush them down. Then it started to spread to other nations, like Canada, because of things that will be decided in the future that will be more suppressive, shutting up freedom of speech. It will be more of a lockdown because of the way they think versus the way Christians think—great persecution coming to the Christians. Now, we got the emails. I don't mean to upset you all, but I have to speak what the Lord tells me to say regardless. It's not easy for me. I'm going to be real with you. It's very hard to come on here and tell you these words when I know it's going to upset people. Jeremiah had to do the same thing. I know your heart, and I know my job is not to scare you but to prepare you. I want to prepare you and sound the alarm as loud as I can for what the Spirit of the Lord is telling me to say, for I am accountable to him only, not to you. Now you say, 'Well, Brandon, I don't agree with you.' That's fine. Do you know how many millions of people—literally, I would say probably 10,000 a month at least—say something because they don't agree with me? They are more vocal than a lot of you are with the nasty emails. But you know what? I keep going because God said to. Persecution comes for the word's sake. You say I've missed it. That's fine. Keep watching. You say you hear this prophet so-and-so saying this, and they say good things are coming to Canada and that there's going to be a flipping of the boat—that it's going to be uncovered just like it was in 2020. Folks, the prophets—I'm going to be just real bold with you right now—the prophetic people who spoke and told you that Joe Biden was going to be removed and that President Trump and all the prophetic words and everything that was spoken in 2020 were false prophecies. They missed it. But a lot of them didn't have the guts to come on and say, "We missed it." Instead, they kept kicking it down, going with QAnon and all the things they said. I'm not here to pick or poke at anybody; I'm here to tell you and shed light on things. If I miss it, I'm very quick to come on here and say, "Listen, I missed it." I don't have anything to hide from you. I don't answer to you; I answer to Him. And if I get in the flesh and I hear something off, then by my goodness, I want to say, "God, correct me, but make me stronger and make me sharper to hear You in these end times." I'm not ashamed. People pick at you all the time, but I'm telling you: I believe there are a lot of people telling you sugar-coated words about what is coming to Canada in the days ahead. There will be a very big shaking in Canada—so much so that I saw an economic disaster. As you see these birthing pains in America, the window of opportunity the Lord is giving us right now for the digital platform, we're seeing that all coming about. And Eric Trump made an announcement about the banks and about the digital currency. There's so much going on right now. Trump is saying that he wants to eliminate the IRS. What did I warn you about the IRS and the Iraqi dinar—about people not paying their taxes or doing what they're supposed to do because they get the sense that the IRS is going to be done away with? But the Lord showed me there was a warning to that. Now, if you don't want to listen, don't listen. There's something there that's a catch; there's something there the Holy Spirit is trying to warn us about. This is way before everybody was saying that anyone making below $200,000 is not going to have to pay taxes. There's something more to this. Why is the Lord warning me to tell you this way before they even started talking about this stuff? And I'm like, "Okay, God, what are You saying in this? What are You saying about what President Trump is saying? What more is there to this, and why would You warn me about this?" So, going back to the vision from last night, we see all these things taking place. We see President Trump coming in now. I saw him on an eagle, and he was flying out; he left on an eagle. Then I saw negotiations with Israel and Hamas and what's going on with Gaza. I saw, not a two-state solution, but the Temple being discussed—a peace treaty so that they could build the Temple Mount. Then I saw major oil across the Mediterranean with an oil derrick dripping, meaning there is a lot of oil. The Lord warned me about the oil, and that was part of the vision I had last night. Then I saw the Middle East as a whole, and what I saw was Iraq rising from the ashes. I saw new buildings and beautiful structures coming to Iraq: skyscrapers, shopping malls, and all kinds of new housing developments. Beautiful things. An economic boom is about to take place in Iraq. A major flow of finances is coming to Iraq—huge money. When I saw this, it was just like what's going on in Saudi Arabia. I saw the economics shift from China and America to Iraq and the Middle East. The Middle East becomes the breadbasket of the world financially. The Lord said to me, "The beginning stages of the Antichrist are at hand." A superpower will rise out of all this as an economic hero—an economic hero, when all of the world's economies are crashing all around. If you look at what the princes and the head people in Saudi Arabia—these rich billionaire men, these tycoon guys—they're all saying, "We're going digital; we want to sell, buy, and trade in these cryptocurrencies." I've seen this stuff; people are sending me things. Look, it's all pointing to the Middle East. So, as we see the Middle East rise up and start to become this super world power with Saudi Arabia, this is what's going to happen. I've told you who I believe the Antichrist is. We're seeing that he will play a major part in the days ahead with the temple agreement with Israel. Israel is part of the Middle East, and we will see Israel rise as the blessing of Abraham. God said, "Remember what I told you all? I'm going to breathe on the Abrahamic covenant, showing the world that I am still the God over Israel, that He is the I AM THAT I AM." And I'm telling you: He's going to show up and show off to the Israeli people. Watch what happens in the days ahead. I saw fruit the size of baseballs—massive fruit, massive agriculture, prosperity over their land like you wouldn't believe. Now, you might say, "Well, I'm not for Benjamin Netanyahu; I'm not for Benjamin Netanyahu. I think he's evil because of what he did to the Palestinians and all this stuff." It has nothing to do with a leader; it has nothing to do with the head of the government. This has to do with a covenant that was made with a people. I want to say that again: it has nothing to do with the Israeli government. You can disagree or agree with what they've done over there, but it's about the bloodline and the Jewish people. It has nothing to do with politics. It has to do with a covenant made thousands of years ago. God is still acknowledging and holding true to the covenant He made with Abraham, saying, "I'm going to make you the father of many nations; I'm going to bless you for a thousand generations." What I'm telling you is it has nothing to do with Benjamin Netanyahu or the politics of Israel today. Politics can change overnight, but what never changes is the Word of God and what He said He would do for His people, saying, "I stand by the covenant I made with Abraham." God is a God whose yeses are yeses and whose nos are nos. He doesn't falter or move away from what He said He would do. So, you need to know it has nothing to do with politics; it has everything to do with a covenant that God made. He is not going to change His mind about a covenant He made because He is a God who does not lie. Does that make sense to you all? Somebody needs to shout, "Amen," at that! I'm telling you, there is a covenant. God has a covenant with you and me, the very covenant He made with every single one of you as you are adopted into Him by grace. You are saved through faith as we turn ourselves from our sin and humble ourselves before a God who loves us and say, "God, I need You more than anything going on around me. I need a God who will love me and take over my life. I surrender myself over to You." And guess what happens? That covenant He made with His Son's blood on that cross—He took it all for you. He made a covenant the moment you take it. This is covenant. This communion cup is covenant. Do you understand? This is a covenant that what I took on my body, you don't need to have in your body. What I did for you, you don't have to live in poverty. I became poor that you might be rich. I became sick that you might be healed. I became everything that the devil has thrown at you since the beginning of time, since Adam fell. Everything from mental torments to broken marriages, I took it all so you could have prosperity in the spirit realm. That's covenant. That's covenant talk. This is covenant. He said, "Do it often in remembrance of me." So the same covenant that was is still strong today for the Jewish people because they don't recognize Jesus yet. They don't. But God is a God of his word. So we see the blessing on what I'm telling you. We see a blessing coming on the oil, and we're going to see it coming out of the Mediterranean. We're going to see it. But as we see the Mahdi rise up, he will not rise up as poor. He will not rise up as weak. He's going to rise up as the world's superpower. And the Lord spoke to me yesterday and he said, "Brandon, you are about to see the bread basket of the world—that first Babylon that fell—and now you will see Babylon rise again. A major economic turnaround is coming to Iraq." And I saw brand new palm trees. I saw it all, ladies and gentlemen. And I saw wealth coming to the Middle East. And as we see that, we know that this is the beginning of the true beginning. He said, "Everything started in the Middle East with the Garden of Eden, and now it will end in the Middle East with the end of ends, the end times." The Jewish people—watch what God does in these days ahead. So, I saw a deal being cut with a peace agreement in the days ahead with Trump, and the Prince of Saudi Arabia will be a big puppet master in this. And folks, we're seeing it. So, we're going to see the window. I believe it. So, thank you for joining me with my recap. I just thought of what the Lord was showing us and what we see in the news today. When Eric Trump said all that he said, we see that everybody's calling for a global recession; most believe it could be worse than a depression. I truly believe that for the body of Christ, the best is yet to come. And that's why I tried to explain to you yesterday when the Lord says to Diana and me and Braden, "Days of great fun are coming for y'all." I truly want you to understand what fun is to us. And that's why I said that for the first time yesterday: what's fun to us is seeing the lost saved, casting out devils, laying hands on the sick, seeing blinded eyes open, having ears that can't hear, hear, raising the dead—doing all the things that the Great Commission told us to do when Jesus said, "Go into all the world." That's what's fun to us, isn't it, baby? We're excited. That's what fun is to us. Now, most people say, "Well, fun to me is going shopping in Beverly Hills." My fun is I want to see a million people saved in a day. My fun is I want to see a whole row of wheelchairs in front of a platform, everyone stand up at once and go, "Boop! I'm healed. I've been in a wheelchair my whole life. I was quadriplegic. Boop, I got healed." That is going to be the day that I'm looking forward to. And I believe we're right on the cusp of it. The greatest move of God that this world has ever seen is about to pour out on this earth like we've never seen before. Judgment begins in the house of the Lord first. And as we see things shaking, as we see things changing, we are seeing new voices. And the Lord said, "I'm bringing a prophetic accuracy to the prophetic movement, to the true men and women that are flowing in my spirit." You will see a true prophetic accuracy like you've never seen before in these generations—hearing and proclaiming what the Spirit of the Lord has told us to say with accuracy as we go vertical, staying like an eagle up in the sky, not down with the chickens. Remember, I warned you all. Don't listen to the roosters crowing and saying only what you have itching ears to hear: "Well, everything's going to be all right. Well, we're having an America turnaround." Turn around in the next couple of years? America is going to be great again? Folks, we're in the end of the end. If we are really in the end of the end, we're going to see a fading of America into a global new world order. It's all being birthed in front of our faces—a new global world order, a digital dollar. That's what's coming. Not America becoming greater. Us having a window of opportunity to get the wealth of the sinner so we can bring in the harvest. He said, "I'm bringing in—" if you remember what Jesus said to me in that vision I had, he said, "Brandon, I'm giving you the harvesting equipment right now." And it was the glory of the Lord—the finances to get it done. That's what this window's for. How big is that window? Some people say, "I'm believing for a door. I'm going to live in the door." That sounds like my wife Diana. She says, "Brandon, I want a door." I'm like, "Yeah, let's have a door, baby." She believes big. To believe for the big, you know? She's like, "Hey, let's believe for a door that's open." And I'm like, "Yeah, let's believe for it. Got to make it bigger. We'll stretch that window out. Isn't that right, hun?" Yes. But we know that Jesus Christ is coming and he's coming back for a glorious church. And I'm not trying to downplay people's words saying that it gets bad and then we come out of it and everything gets better. Some people want to believe that. That's fine. All I know is I'm looking at what the Lord's saying to me and he's telling me he's coming. He's coming. And who was it? Babe, somebody sent you a video from, what was that? El Shaddai Ministries. What was his name? His name is Mark Biltz. Yeah, Mark Biltz. I say it right. The blood moon man. He said that he's talking about the four-year window of the Shemitah, which ends in 2029, fall of 2029. And I keep telling you all, the Lord said, "I'm giving you a four-year window." What will you do with that four-year window? An extension of grace for a harvest of souls. And if that is ending in 2029 and he started talking about the 2029 window, he said the tribulation begins at the beginning of a Shemitah cycle for a seven-year cycle. And he said if it doesn't happen in 2029, it will be extended clear into 2036. Folks, I don't believe we have that long. I believe we're out of here by 2029, somewhere around in there. I'm just believing that, y'all—that we have that four-year window for a revival from this time and that God's given us this window for a wealth transfer, for a major harvest of souls. And I do not believe that the revival will last for years and years. I believe it's a small window revival, a small window for a great outpouring. If you look at every single thing, people's attention span is not that long—is what I'm trying to say. I just believe we're on the cusp of something great, that something is about to take place—it won't take them that long once they have that peace agreement to build this third temple. People say, "Well, they're already starting to build it." I don't know. I haven't seen anything on that, that there's a groundwork being done or anything. All I know is that the Lord showed me it will be a quick thing and we're going to be out of here before you know it. So, I pray this video blessed y'all today. Did it bless you today, Diana? Yes. It's exciting. She never knows what I'm going to say. I told her, I said, "I feel this in my spirit. I got to go out there and make a video." So, do you want to take communion with me? You can take it on the other side. All right. We're going to take communion. We're going to pray. We're going to agree for big. We're going to believe for the turnaround. We're going to believe for exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think; today is the day that the Lord has made and we will rejoice and be glad in it. Are we afraid of all the things that Brandon is saying? No, it's not a call to fear. It's a call to prayer. And I just believe we're on the cusp of something huge—that we're seeing America come, and we're about to have our little golden age (what all these people are calling the golden age) for this little window—and then I believe we're getting ready to be shot like a rocket into the new tribulation. Another area of birthing pains. Glory to God. This is an exciting time, not a sad time. This is an amazing, rejoicing time, not a time of pulling back and shrinking back and going, "Well, Canada lost, Australia, all this stuff." Oh, who knows? So, Father, we just lift up this body before you in the name of Jesus. And we thank you, Lord, for all that you've done and all that you're going to do; that you were wounded for our transgressions. You were bruised for our iniquities. The chastisement of our peace was upon you. And with your stripes, we are healed. Now, Lord, we take this body in the name of Jesus. And we expect healing to manifest on us. No headaches, no stomach bugs, no whatever you may be overcoming in your life today. Jesus paid the price on that cross for you not to have to walk in sickness and disease. That's what the Bible says, and I believe it, and I receive it by faith in the name of Jesus. And we take this body and we thank you, Lord. We thank you, Lord, for all that you've done and all that you're going to do in our lives today. Father, it's done. We receive it. We thank you, Lord, for our future, that it looks better than our past. Father, I thank you, Lord. Our future's bright, and we receive this body in Jesus' name. Now Lord, we plead the blood over us and we thank you for the blood. We make much of the blood and the blood makes much of us. We thank you, Lord, for the blood. We apply the blood of Jesus Christ over us. And we thank you, Lord, that your blood cleanses us from all unrighteousness. Thank you, Lord, for the blood of Jesus Christ today. Thank you, Lord, that you washed us in the blood. Thank you, Lord, that we go from glory to glory. Like Diana's favorite song, "From Glory to Glory," he's changing you. Do you believe that inside today? From glory to glory where he's changing you. Father, we thank you for the blood. We apply the blood over our children, over our wives, our husbands, our finances. We apply the blood and we thank you, Lord, that Satan cannot cross the bloodline. We plead the blood of Jesus all around our houses, all around our cars, our whatever we have. Father, I plead the blood of Jesus over us that no weapon formed against us is going to prosper. And a curse without a cause cannot stand. It cannot stand. And it doesn't have a cause because the blood of Jesus reigns supreme over all of us. Thank you, Lord. From the top of our head to the soles of our feet, Lord, we plead the blood in Jesus' name. Amen. Thank you for taking communion with me. You don't have to take it by yourself. She's my hero behind the camera today. We're excited, y'all. Diana and I are excited. We're expecting. If we only have a four-year window—Diana, we talk about it all the time—if we only have a four-year window until the next Shemitah cycle, the next Shemitah cycle would be fall of 2029. And Diana did the math for me and she told me, she said, "Brandon, do you realize fall of 2029—it'll go like a blink." I pray it's not 2036. I mean, that seems like a long ways whenever you say 2036. So, I'll feel like I'm getting old at that time, which I know I'm still not old, but 2036, it seems like a little longer, of course, because I just don't feel that. I just feel that we're right there. Let's just finish strong. Regardless of whatever it is, let's finish strong. I just thought it was a really interesting sermon somebody sent me from Mark Biltz. Right. El Shaddai Ministries. I don't know if this man's a Jew or not, but I thought it was pretty cool. One day maybe I can have him on; he can talk about some of this stuff. I think it's cool. Jonathan Cahn talks about it, too. But I just go, "Wow." You know, I just think it's fascinating. God is a God of order and everything is so mathematically perfect. Everything he does is so perfect. So it's just like, "Wow, God." He's an awesome God and he wows me. Everything he does. Diana, in her book—she got this new book, "Seeing Jesus"—the author wrote that book. It's based supposedly not on a true story, but it's a fun book. It's a fun read if you want to read it. "Seeing Jesus" by who? Jeffrey McClain Jones. And so she read that book "Seeing Jesus," and it's just a fun read. One of her favorites. Well, he has a whole bunch of new books. And so right now she's reading a book about the tribulation and the two witnesses. I don't know; I haven't started it really yet. She's about to start it. She's a bookworm. Diana, y'all, Diana can read a whole book. She was bragging last night. She told me, "Hey, baby, guess what? I just finished reading the Bible." And I said, "Again?" She reads it through all the time, but I'm just saying she's already finished reading the Bible through this year. And for me, I don't read that fast, but I listen to it and she's in there. I said, "Good for you, honey. I'm so proud." So now she's going to read it again; she'll read it through twice this year. Not that we're trying to flex, but I'm just proud of her. I have to brag on her, y'all. And because she's on that side and not sitting next to me, it makes it not as awkward. So, she is a bookworm. She reads a lot. She reads lots and lots of books. She can read a book in an afternoon and I go, "How do you do that and comprehend?" She's flipping those pages. It's pretty incredible, actually. As I see her, she says, "I speed read." She's just like this, and she's done. She goes, "I'm done." That fast. "That was a good book. I enjoyed that." So, it's our little funny thing because that's serious. Well, I believe the best is yet to come. Let's pray. Let's pray for some things. Let's see what the Lord has for us. You know, I always try to make it easier for people who don't pray in the Holy Ghost. And I try, but I like it when we see stuff. And if the Lord wants to show us something, I want to be there to see it. And when I'm praying in English, folks, it doesn't happen that way. Every single time, isn't it, Diana? Whenever I'm praying in the spirit and we pray as a family, if the Lord wants to show something, it's never in English. He starts showing it when I'm praying in the spirit first, right? Always. And it's been that way since we've been married. I've been seeing like this since I was 16 years old. And the Lord started developing this when I was praying one day and I was interceding for a woman who was being abused. I started seeing like this, and the fire hit my ears and my eyes. My brother and I shared a bunk bed, and I was down, praying and interceding. I was in there interceding for this woman, and all of a sudden, fire hit my head and my eyes, and I started seeing. I didn't know what was going on with me; I just started seeing pictures, and it freaked me out the first time it happened because I was like, 'What is going on with me?' I remember just feeling the anointing and the presence all over me. I ran in and told my mom, my dad, and everybody, 'This is what I saw.' They took note of it, thinking, 'Well, I'm sure people are thinking this kid is a little strange.' Most people still do today, and I'm an adult. But ever since then, it's just been coming. It's been getting more and more, and I've learned how to look into it. Whenever the Lord shows me, I can almost pause it and look into it to see what's going on. It's very interesting.
